ops.body: P5 progress 2026-07-18: release-app.yml shipped + rehearsed GREEN on scratch repo github.com/yasyf/daemonkit-release-rehearsal (rc v0.0.1-rc.2 + stable no-cask v0.0.1): Developer ID chain + hardened runtime, empty entitlements (no get-task-allow), notarytool Accepted + staple valid + spctl 'Notarized Developer ID', full universal .app artifact, prerelease-cask exclusion PROVEN (cask job skipped, tap untouched). Workflow fix folded back: homebrew-tap 4c1c4e3 writes Version.xcconfig before xcodegen generate. Criterion 6fb898d MET: v1.3.0 cut + v1 alias advanced to 4c1c4e3 (only-new-file range check done). repo-bootstrap daemonkit layer committed (cc-skills ab15e8a3, CI green) with the caller template corrected to rehearsal-proven wiring (marketing_version derive job, bundle=value pair formats, cask_template_path pairing, permissions contents:write) + scaffold smoke-tested (real render, actionlint clean). daemonkit templates gained release.yml.tmpl + README render-order reconciliation (3d249de9, CI green after known-flake rerun). Criterion ed8c266 stays PENDING, scoped: the minimal rehearsal exercised every applicable Verification-#6 assert but NOT the profile-name/group-authorization assert (profile_names empty skips it) nor upgrade-service-readiness — both get proven at the first real profiled consumer (cc-pool widget, Track P) alongside the cask-publish path. Criterion 6bc48ec (apple-certs portal dry-run to download step) not attempted this session; SKILL.md runbook does name the intermediate-only-p12/quill failure. Remaining: those two criteria + go-ci-and-release.md § daemonkit helper-app recipe section (template comment currently points at daemonkit templates/README.md).
